subject: feat(ui): add burger menu with in-app help drawers
body:
Replace the standalone "?" help button with a hamburger menu that provides
access to the tutorial, User Guide, and Test Scenarios. Guides render as
slide-out drawers using `marked` to parse the markdown docs imported at
build time via Vite ?raw.

Also fixes a pre-existing TS2352 type error in exportImport.ts (double
cast through `unknown`).

Tags: ui, help, menu, drawer, markdown, docs
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: help-system
Semver: minor
